subject: Ramuh — large dark-winged humanoid figure with long pale beard, arms outstretched, surrounded by crackling blue lightning
description: A large, imposing winged humanoid figure dominates the frame. Wide dark wings are spread behind it, and the figure has a pale, aged face with a long beard. Both arms are extended outward or forward, and crackling blue-white lightning energy arcs around and from the figure. The background shows a purple-tinged rocky or crystalline environment shrouded in darkness. The overall composition conveys enormous power and elemental force. The art is rendered in a 3D CG style consistent with Final Fantasy's classic summon aesthetic.
foreground: Large winged figure with outstretched arms surrounded by blue lightning
background: Purple rocky darkness with lightning reflections
